body.title: Bridge word graph and memory graph — Hebbian substrate unification
body.result: Hebbian bridge implemented in cognition/hebbian_bridge.py (gated by IGOR_HEBBIAN_BRIDGE=true). Three functions: wg_boost_search() uses predict_next() to boost memory candidate scores by predicted-word overlap before embedding rerank; record_retrieval_boost() feeds high-importance retrieved nodes back into word graph proportional to arousal; wg_predict_for_activation() fires word graph queries per spreading-activation node to widen neighbor scoring. cortex.search() gains word_graph= param wiring all three in. 16 tests, 143 total pass.
body.description: Unify word graph and memory graph on a single Hebbian substrate. #308
